programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged with selling the biggest townhouse in the neighborhood; Steve tries to sell an apartment with a location flaw; Fredrik gets creative to market a billion-dollar project that's in shambles; Ryan and Emilia make a major decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik may need to go back to the 1980s to find a buyer for his listing; Ryan has to sell a mansion built on top of a freeway; Steve goes to upstate New York to help a billionaire client but realizes his listing may turn out to be a "Payne."

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan views a seven-story townhouse featuring an indoor pool; Steve's event at the 160-acre Payne Estate features ax-throwing competitions and carriage rides to rein in a big-city buyer; Fredrik works hard to sell a home with extravagant décor.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan pitches his brand new seven-story Chelsea townhouse as a smart-home paradise for tech enthusiasts; Luis and Ronita explore the idea of reuniting; Fredrik's former assistant, Jordan, invites him to help close the deal on a new listing in Tribeca.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ronita decides her partnership with Luis needs a tuneup; Ryan is thrilled to land three luxury properties in NoHo, but he is quickly burdened with 233 other units... all of them rentals; Steve's own apartment becomes his latest listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve puts on a rubber mask to observe Jess at her first broker's open house; Fredrik follows a lead for his Tribeca listing; Ryan lands a beautifully renovated loft in Chelsea.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan bets a Chelsea loft commission on a table tennis match; Steve's girlfriend settles into their new home together; Fredrik thinks his Crosby listing's massive terrace could be perfect for trained pets; a new, up-and-coming agent joins the crew.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan interviews young agents for his new rental team; Steve and a childhood friend hit the gym to weigh all the investment properties they've seen; Tyler invites a famous mentalist to his Mercantile open house party; Fredrik hosts an open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik hustles for offers at his disco-themed open house; Steve hosts a book launching event at his open house; Tyler faces off with Ryan over a listing for a massive loft on Laight Street.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve works to install an elevator in his new listing; Tyler gets a wake-up call while hosting a morning open house; Fredrik's husband's love of New York turns chilling during a raging snowstorm; Ryan re-brands a nameless neighborhood.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan invites an illusionist to his open house; L.A. agent Josh Altman isn't thrilled that Fredrik is building a West Coast team; Steve's in a professional pickle; Tyler plans a horse carriage ride through Central Park for potential buyers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan premieres a music video for his Tribeca loft; Tyler pitches the biggest listing of his career; Fredrik and Derek tour a rental home for themselves in Los Angeles, but local brokers don't give them a warm welcome; Steve gets blind-sided.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik has a run-in with L.A. agent Heather Altman at his open house; Ryan markets a beautiful Park Avenue apartment to mysterious buyers from a secret government; Steve realizes decisions at home are easier to make than decisions with developers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lands a prime listing in SoHo that everyone, except Tyler, says is amazing; Steve asks Jess to help with a Bedford-Stuyvesant listing, but their contrasting selling styles may sink the deal; a seller steers Ryan towards hiring Luis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan and Luis host a dinner party to sell their listing but struggle to rein in Ramona Singer; Fredrik's listing isn't big enough to satisfy his buyer's needs, so he tries to sell her a different unit, even if it's one he doesn't represent.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh lists a Beverly Hills mansion but has problems with the buyer; Chad lists a million-dollar home; Madison lists a Malibu estate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Roddy McDowall guest stars as Leo Ostro, a brilliant crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of the IMF when he launches a mysterious one-hundred-million-dollar scheme.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Elevators and escalators - Mister Rogers shows some toy machines, and rides on real ones that lift people and cars. There's even a hydraulic platform delivered by Mr. McFeely in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A domino display artist sets up thousands of dominoes. When one is knocked over, they all go down in a fascinating pattern. Lady Elaine's elevator in Make-Believe takes Robert Troll up in the air as if he's flying.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Flags, marbles, a slide – so many things go up and down. Mister Rogers learns some up and down exercises from Neighbor Marilyn Barnett and Kara, a young ballerina.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A visit with world famous clarinetist, Richard Stoltzman, who makes music playing notes that go up and down. In Make-Believe, there's hope that an elevator operator will solve the up and down problem at Lady Elaine's Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Balloon artist, Bruce Franco, blows up balloons into animal shapes. It takes a lot of practice to be able to make fancy things like that from balloons. Then, Mr. McFeely and Mayor Maggie go up in the air for a hot-air balloon ride.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make stuffed bears. Mr. McFeely encounters someone dressed in a bear costume. Daniel recognizes that the bear is a person in costume and realizes that person is Lady Aberlin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting the Neighborhood aviary, Mister Rogers sees a variety of birds. King Friday scolds his birds as they fail to meet his exercise expectations. Mayor Maggie invites the birds to join her as she goes to the new "Museum of Love."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers takes out a wooden block and talks about when he was young and would use a block to pretend he was shaving. At Negri's Music Shop, mandolinist Peter Ostroushko sings a Ukrainian lullaby.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers blows some bubbles and calls a plumber because the water in his house isn't working.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is concerned when he sees a small toy Trolley on the tracks. Robert Troll picks it up and tells the prince that the real Trolley is playing at Daniel's clock. Daniel shares that the Trolley can do some "magical things."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Jim West, a shadow artist, creates silhouettes of various animals. King Friday asks Robert Troll to help him by return some shadows that were left behind at the castle by various Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a painting of the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mime artist Motoko demonstrates her talents by miming various activities. Trolley shows baby pictures of Prince Tuesday, King Friday and Lady Aberlin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that everything in the world is unique: "Whenever you see somebody, even somebody in a mirror, you know that that's the only one there is."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: World-famous violinist Itzhak Perlman joins Mister Rogers in a rehearsal room and shares some of his music, as well as some of his feelings about dealing with polio.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride a bus and notice people wearing hats. Mayor Maggie wears a three-cornered hat and offers one to Queen Sara and King Friday. The King declares that everyone in the Neighborhood must wear these hats.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bob Trow picks up the Bob Dog costume from Mister Rogers. Handyman Negri provides both royal birds with a three-cornered hat. Quickly finding a hat to fit Bob Dog, however, proves to be a bit more difficult.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces Mr. Morrison, who is playing the organ. Neighbor Aber says that anytime someone says anything about three-cornered hats, Lady Elaine squirts them with her hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido's plan to obtain the great treasure infuriates Orochi, but his unexpected violent move silences everyone. Meanwhile at the back entrance of Onigashima, Kikunojo squares off against Kanjuro and gets into an emotional fight with her former colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members start charging towards Kaido from the back of Onigashima. Meanwhile, at the Performance Floor, Kaido closes in on Momonosuke shivering in terror and asks him the ultimate question which will determine his fate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members deliver a crushing blow to Kaido. Luffy and Yamato try to back them up, but Ulti stands in their way and Big Mom spots Luffy. Meanwhile, Nami and Carrot free themselves from their enemies and move on to take back Zeus!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom Pirates gasp with surprise to see thousands of samurai warriors coming into the castle. In his dragon form, Kaido goes outside to fight the Akazaya members under the moon/

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shinobu tries to rescue the weakened Momonosuke but is found by King and attacked. On the other hand, Nami takes back Zeus from Big Mom and runs away but loses him again and gets chased by Zeus who is ordered to kill to her by Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky faces Big Mom with the help of Robin and Jimbei, but the Numbers come interrupting their battle. One of them holds Brachio Tank with Usopp and Chopper inside in his hand. Meanwhile, Yamato finally meets his son Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Drake vows to fight alongside Luffy, but Zoro becomes skeptical and challenges him to a fight. Meanwhile, Usopp's practical joke pushes Nami into confronting Ulti, who is infuriated since her brother got attacked.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen uses a new version of the Plague Bullets which will turn the samurai into ogre-like monsters. Meanwhile, the Minks keep pushing the fight against the Gifters and drive Jack into a corner. However, Kaido stands up for his subordinate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy is hurrying to the rooftop and Yamato is trying to catch up to Momonosuke to protect him, the Akazaya members finally face off against Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen, the Lead Performer, blazes away at samurai on the Performance Floor with the special version of the Plague Rounds, which turns them into hideous ogres that corner Zoro and Drake

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: King orders his subordinates to go after Momonosuke. Shinobu tries to protect him, but they are cornered by one of the strong Lead Performers from the Animal Kingdom Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato fights Sasaki and the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division to protect Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Zoro tries to get rid of the Gifters who have turned into Ice Oni, but Queen starts a horrible game which involves the antibody for the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ulti and Page One of the Tobi Roppo chase Nami and Usopp, after being infuriated by their attack as well as Luffy's declaration of becoming the King of the Pirates. Cornered, Nami gives in and Ulti pushes her to say the unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot and Wanda step in to help Marco, who is cornered by Big Mom and Perospero. In the meantime, Yamato fights a fierce battle against the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division led by Sasaki, while protecting Shinobu and Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Drake continue to chase Apoo to get the antibody against Ice Oni, while Chopper is trying to figure out how to fight the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hears a woman's scream for help and dashes into the room the scream can be heard from. However, it's a trap set up by Black Maria of the Tobi Roppo. Meanwhile, Luffy and Jimbei who are trying to reach the rooftop get help from the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Kaido begins the New Onigashima Project, Marco appears in front of Chopper and the others, who are struggling with Ice Oni. The members of the Tobi Roppo continue to give the Straw Hats a hard time while their former member helps Zoro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu that he once confronted a man, who came to Onigashima looking to get Kaido's head. His name was Ace. The two of them engaged in a fierce battle that eventually turned into an important friendship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The formidable Lead Performers of the Animal Kingdom Pirates stand in Zoro's way as he tries to get to the rooftop. Marco sees his late comrade in Zoro's determination and tries to pave the way for him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu about how Ace gave him hope for the future. Meanwhile, Luffy and the other allied pirates from the Worst Generation make it to the rooftop to finally face off against Kaido and Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's strong attack reminds Kaido of all the strong ones he's ever met. On the other hand, Luffy, Law, and Kid keep quarreling amongst themselves. Meanwhile, Sanji is caught and interrogated by Black Maria in what he calls "heaven."

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kid, Zoro, and Killer keep landing hard blows against Kaido in tandem despite the arguing. However, when Big Mom steps in and unleashes powerful lightning strikes, the tide turns for all except one of the rookies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pummels Kaido with his well-trained Kong Gatling and delivers a final blow using all his strength. Big Mom tries to fight back, but Law gets in her way and Kid and Killer also try to finish Kaido off.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After watching the Straw Hats' departure to Onigashima, Tama wondered if there was anything she could do to help the Straw Hats and the samurai. Now that she's here on Onigashima, it's time to execute her powerful plan – Operation Kibi Dango!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji is captured and tortured by the merciless Black Maria. She names the terms of his release: to turn over one of his crewmates. He hesitates but has no other option. After much distress, he makes a move that surprises everyone.

programme.desc: Night Man accidentally resurrects a mummified Egyptian queen, with predictably disasterous results.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a mother and her two daughters fail to show up for Christmas dinner, officers enter their home and discover all three have been shot to death; the search for their killer reveals an unthinkable family nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home; neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy; police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning; a single palm print is left behind; investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a family is found massacred inside their Santa Claus, Georgia home, the hunt for their killer hinges on the eyewitness testimony of the three young surviving daughters.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio, is terrorized over the Christmas holiday as a string of brutal shootings have the residents wondering if they could be next.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Beloved Christmas tree farmers are executed in the front seat of their car and a manhunt for their killer is launched that keeps investigators on the case for over three decades before justice is served.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young mother is murdered during Christmas, investigators uncover a love triangle that shocks her family and forever robs them of their holiday cheer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a young man and woman are found shot execution-style in a mall parking lot in the early hours of Christmas Eve, investigators believe a love triangle might have led to these brutal murders.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After responding to a robbery at a sporting goods store on Christmas Eve, an Irving, Texas police officer is gunned down in cold blood.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home; detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Ortega family's annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower opens fire; detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is gunned down in their bed during what looks like a brutal home invasion, but police soon discover the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of deception and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Firefighters respond to a house fire and discover three gunshot victims inside; authorities pursue the heavily armed murderer through Christmas.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve in a quiet town, elderly couple Bob and Idella Young are brutally slain at home; a bloody glove found at the crime scene has the killer's DNA, but no one matches the sample.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town; after killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody; when police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: From Russia with Love
programme.desc: James Bond (Sean Connery) delivers another blistering, thrill-a- minute caper as he attempts to thwart the enemy from seizing a decoder that can access Russian state secrets. Robert Shaw co-stars.

programme.title: Goldfinger
programme.desc: From its shocking prologue to an exhilarating midair climax, this lightning-paced 007 thriller features Sean Connery battling cunning international smugglers intent on infiltrating Fort Knox.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: You Only Live Twice
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as James Bond in this special-effects spectacular that takes him to Japan to foil an evil plot involving the onset of a nuclear war between the Russians and Americans.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as the dynamic 007, on the trail of a diamond smuggler who leads him on a nerve-shattering chase through Amsterdam, Los Angeles and eventually, glittery Las Vegas.

programme.title: 007: GoldenEye (ESP)
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: 007: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: 007: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: 007: Otro día para morir
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) quita el freno para llevarte por un viaje inolvidable a través del mundo y lleno de adrenalina, en esta aventura cargada de acción.

programme.title: 007: Casino Royale (ESP)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) enfrenta un desafío mortal: evitar que Le Chiffre, un peligroso banquero, gane un juego de póker multimillonario y utilice sus ganancias para financiar el terrorismo global.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: Jack Reacher

programme.desc: Sam enters a beauty pageant, which she detests, to make a statement about individuality but discovers instead that it's organizer is the Dragon Ghost!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: On a field trip everyone notices Tucker bears a striking resemblance to an egyptian pharaoh and after he looks in a ghostly mirror, his minion, Hotep Ra, comes to life.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: After Vlad sends three ghosts to Amity Park to battle Danny Phantom, we find out that he's working on his creepiest project yet: a clone of Danny Phantom.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny won't admit his jealousy of Sam's new crush, Gregor. Instead he convinces himself that Gregor is an undercover operative for the Guys in White.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Vlad forces Danny to get Clockwork's help to travel back in time in order to cure a case of ecto acne that he contracted after a lab accident in college.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny and Vlad's game of revenge against each other begins with childish pranks, and, unfortunately for Danny, ends when Vlad decides to run for mayor of Amity Park!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Danny helps pull a thorn out of an abominable snowman-like creature, who presides over the chilliest area of the ghost zone.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Kitty, Ember, and Penelope Spectra are sick of the ghost-men in their lives, so they decide they're going to do something about it, by making all the men of Amity Park disappear.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Amity Park is in the midst of a drought and Mayor Vlad, eager to score points, releases Vortex, the weather ghost, to make it rain.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town. Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees, decides to switch with Danny, but when their powers collide it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Lt. Albrecht and Lt. Cmdr. Zuzello make Zuzello’s farewell flight before he retires. All is fine until Albrecht notices that his partner is passed out from hypoxia. Albrecht makes an emergency landing on the ship.Harm is sent to the ship to investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: As a favor from Congresswoman Lillian Dorning, SECNAV Sheffield asks the JAG staff to get the story of a submarine, USS Angel Shark (SSGN-559), which was lost on a CIA mission in 1968.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm serves as a judge and Mac is the contentious prosecutor in a case fraught withpolitical implications when an American aviator is charged with killing three Britishsoldiers during a flight mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a Gulf War MIA victim is found as the sheik’s wife in a nomadic Arab tribe, Bud prosecutes and Mac defends her against charges of desertion and, in a stunning turn of events, treason. Harm tries to get his old job back but is turned away.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Rose Murphy is sexually assaulted at work by her boss and, fending off another attack, she kills him. When she confesses the shooting to her husband, he makes it look like a failed robbery. A pair of thieves are arrested, but the clues don’t add up.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A high school principal reaches out to Walker when his school is overrun by drugs. It appears to be an inside job as the students always know when there is a raid. When the principal finds the leader, he is killed.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Cherokee Indian racing team is experiencing a lot of problems with their cars and drivers. A rival team wants to make sure the Cherokee does not win the races. Meanwhile, a young girl is kidnapped so Trent and Carlos search for her.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A Cherokee driver is injured by a rival racing team. Walker takes his place in the race.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Models are being kidnapped to be sold in a sex-slavery auction. Trivette's girlfriend is the most recent disappearance. The Rangers must find where the models are being held before the sale is finished.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A crime lord named Caleb Hooks, whom Walker helped put in prison several years ago, escapes from prison, hell bent on revenge against the Texas Rangers (because Hooks' brother had been shot and killed during a shootout, and he claims it was murder).

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Eager to make a difference, Christine volunteers to collect signatures supporting an issue she doesn't quite understand—as she finds out from a competitive signature-seeker, Audrey.

programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn't speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le da un regalo a su hijo cuando vuelve a encontrarse con Norma en los límites de la hacienda, ella no esconde sus sentimientos. Ruth desafía a su madre y comienza a trabajar con Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando asume el cargo de administrador de la hacienda Elizondo, tanto Norma como Juan desconfían de sus intenciones. Óscar pide ser el galán del comercial de Jimena y Rosario busca a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma decide bautizar al bebé y le dice a Juan que se llamará Juan David, después del bautizo él le presenta su hijo a todos los empleados. Gabriela interroga a Fernando sobre Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: At long last, the Veteran War has arrived testing everyone's loyalty. The muddy "Bombshell Battle" mission shows who is truly playing dirty. TJ shocks the agents at elimination with a massive twist that will change the game.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: One player makes a devastating mistake at the "Satellite Sabotage" mission that could put his team in jeopardy. A Rookie makes a bold, but questionable, game move. Two players battle for survival in the classic elimination game, "Pole Wrestle."

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Players commemorate the 500th episode of The Challenge with the physically demanding "Brush Contact" mission. Players get into a heated argument at the club. Players try to pressure one agent into volunteering for elimination in order to infiltrate cells.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group out of Atlanta; the group is stopped by a threat unlike anything anyone has seen before; the search for someone who has gone missing.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick discovers a possible safe haven; Shane must go on a dangerous mission to get needed medical supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group awaits Shane's return; Shane finds himself trapped in a school; Daryl and Andrea search for someone in the woods.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane makes a deadly sacrifice that inspires unusual behavior and self-distancing; the rest of the group struggles to find the balance between living to die and dying to live.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the other survivors continue searching for Sophia; Hershel disagrees with the group's plan and tells them they are only welcome at the farm temporarily.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn knows too much for his comfort level; Daryl finds a sign of life and tries to make it back to the farm alive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Secrets are told and revealed; Hershel refuses to acknowledge the world's new reality; Andrea comes out of her shell; everything is food for something.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others try to restore order after a terrible discovery; Hershel takes up an old habit and disappears.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enemies trap Rick, Hershel and Glenn, who fight to survive; when everyone realizes she is missing, Shane goes after Lori and finds her in danger.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick invade Woodbury con la intención de rescatar a Glenn y Maggie. Michonne descubre el secreto familiar que oculta el Gobernador cuando trata de asesinarlo. En la prisión, un grupo desconocido atraviesa la verja de seguridad.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agents James West and Artemus Gordon attempt to stem a tide of counterfeit currency.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon help a frightened sheriff defend his town against an attack by an army of cutthroats.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon work to avert the destruction of the American Cotton industry.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Former inmates of a Civil War prison camp seek revenge against the camp commandant because of his alleged atrocities against them.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tom build a new subfloor. Richard hunts for an old clawfoot tub. Tom demonstrates how to check porch level and build a hip roof. Kevin learns about a job training program in Baltimore.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices learn the basics of framing a deck while the chimney gets demo'ed. The interior designer creates a custom pattern for the floor. The flue for the wood burning stove is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices learn how to frame a wall in the master bedroom, build a drain stack for the master bath, and lay decking on the front porch. The homeowners visit their kitchen cabinet designer.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Flooring is used to make a barn door. Roger teaches a horticulture class. Tommy and Charlie find an uninsulated crawl space. The garage floor gets radiant heat and the front porch gets columns.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices get a lesson in roofing, Kevin watches how an elaborate Chippendale railing is put together, the basement gets moisture prevention, and Richard shows how ductwork is put together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin reviews the progress being made upstairs. Most of the new work is at the back of the house. New gas lines are installed. Tommy builds a shower bench and double hung replacement windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Granite is laid for the stove. Nathan installs a porch ceiling. Kevin sees a Rhode Island home with pine trim. Richard reviews component placement at the mechanical wall. Mauro fixes holes in plaster.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: At the Newton Project, trim interior columns, stair treads, and stained-glass windows are installed. Kevin tours a flooring factory. Richard teaches a plumbing class.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm fits an old door. Roger sees a premade stone wall installed in sections. Kevin visits a career day for the trades. Twin built-in beds are made in Rhode Island. Tommy reinstalls a corner cabinet.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger explains why preventative tree work is needed. Homeowner Liz gets a tiling lesson. The original newel post is discovered to be walnut. The apprentices graduate after ten weeks of hard work.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm lays composite decking. Charlie makes exterior decorative brackets. Kevin watches a quartz countertop get installed. Roger paves the front walk. Liz fits her stained-glass window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds Tommy and Charlie installing a fireback. Roger returns the flowers he saved. The island countertop goes on. Kevin watches a crew install a garage door. The wood stove arrives.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's the wrap of another great project. Kevin tours the renovated house with the homeowners. Their kids and Joe's parents arrive to check out the new and improved home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new two-project series begins in Charleston, South Carolina: a brick 1840s "single house" and a multi-generational 1890s home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Demo starts on the Charleston projects. Judith talks planting options with Roger, who visits a suitable nursery. Kevin tours the American College of the Building Arts. Richard goes privy diving.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An old fireplace houses a new stove. Tommy discusses using interior casework with exposed brick. Roger tours hidden gardens. Demolition continues while Tommy and Judith look at flooring options.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A foundation starts while Roger tries to save a crepe myrtle. Kevin visits Fort Sumter. The single house mantel and windows get restored and the old kitchen house gets connected to the main house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin meets a lumberjack. Tommy watches how pipes are disguised, and Richard seeks out places for HVAC equipment. Kevin learns about Single Houses. A crepe myrtle gets pruned and Tommy talks termites.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard works on plumbing at the Elliotborough house while Kevin meets a kitchen designer. The porch gets assessed. A floor goes down at the single house. Tommy and Mark snake wires through a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old piazza columns get restored. The iron gate is made by blacksmith students at a local college. Lights are selected for an old house. New siding mixes with old to meet historic district codes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Charleston boasts a colorful housing stock. Judith decides on a siding color for the Elliotborough project. Kevin meets her and a design expert in a neighborhood famous for house colors, Rainbow Row.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The pergola goes up. Ross looks at smart home technology. A local craftsman puts the finishing touches on a dining table. Richard checks out the HVAC plan while repointing starts on the fireplaces.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The iron gate is fitted at the Charleston Single House. Kevin, Tom, and Richard tour the renovations. Richard visits the Elliotborough project for updates. The completion of the project is celebrated.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A year after California’s worst wildfire, the people of Paradise are still clearing the devastation. About 90% of the homes were lost. Kevin, Tom, and Richard meet families determined to rebuild.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack becomes entangled in a feud between his two roommates when Janet accuses Chrissy of stealing a handsome young executive from her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A tiny tyke terrorizes Jack and Chrissy with the threat of tears after Janet presses them into service as inexperienced, substitute sitters.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy cranks out amateur movies of Jack and Janet, and is misled into thinking she has an "interesting" talent for film making.

programme.title: Three's Company
